task_completion.description: Open a daily chart for AAPL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A NinjaTrader 8 chart window is open displaying 'AAPL' and a daily timeframe (e.g., '1 Day', 'Daily', or 'D' in the top left corner or title bar).

task_completion.description: Add a 9-period Exponential Moving Average (EMA) to the chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An EMA line is plotted on the main price chart, with a label indicating a period of 9 (e.g., 'EMA(9)' in the indicator legend at the top left of the chart panel).

task_completion.description: Add a 21-period Exponential Moving Average (EMA) to the chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A second EMA line is plotted on the main price chart, with a label indicating a period of 21 (e.g., 'EMA(21)' in the indicator legend).

task_completion.description: Add a 14-period Relative Strength Index (RSI) in a separate panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A separate panel (usually below the main price chart) displays an RSI oscillator with a label indicating a period of 14 (e.g., 'RSI(14, 3)' or 'RSI(14)').

task_completion.description: Add a MACD (12, 26, 9) indicator in a separate panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A separate panel displays a MACD indicator with labels indicating the parameters 12, 26, and 9 (e.g., 'MACD(12, 26, 9)').

task_completion.description: Save the configured chart as a template named 'SwingTrading'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' or 'Save As' template dialog box in NinjaTrader showing the file name 'SwingTrading' being entered, or a menu showing 'SwingTrading' in the list of available chart templates.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the NinjaTrader 8 graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the NinjaTrader 8 application windows, indicator configuration menus, and dialogs being used.

integrity.description: The indicators are genuinely applied to a NinjaTrader chart.
integrity.visual_evidence: The indicators appear visually rendered on the chart with proper axes, lines, and data, not just text typed into a document.

integrity.description: The template was created via the UI, not by directly writing an XML file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of text editors or IDEs (like Notepad or VS Code) open with XML template code; presence of NinjaTrader's native indicator and template configuration windows.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Instrument: AAPL. Template Name: 'SwingTrading'. Required Indicators: EMA(9), EMA(21), RSI(14), MACD(12,26,9). The template should be saved in the standard NinjaTrader 8 directory: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\templates\Chart. RSI and MACD must be in separate panels from the main price chart.
